nodes.name: Fetch Swipe Reference
nodes.notes: Fetch the swipe that serves as the visual style reference. Its recreation_prompt + image_url are used for NanoBanana.

nodes.name: Prepare Prompts
nodes.notes: Constructs a NanoBanana prompt for each variant, combining the swipe's recreation_prompt + brand colors + copy text.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Process variants one at a time to avoid rate limits on NanoBanana API.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ prompt: $json.prompt, width: $json.width, height: $json.height, reference_image: $json.reference_image_url || undefined, num_images: 1 }) }}

nodes.name: NanoBanana: Generate Image
nodes.notes: TODO: Replace URL and auth with actual NanoBanana API endpoint. Sends prompt + optional reference image for style-matched generation.
